SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Dec-01-2023 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Plaintiff/Cross-Defendant/Respondent Max McKelvy appeared.
Defendant/Cross-Complainant/Appellant Diana Meistrell appeared.

This cause comes on regularly for trial de novo.

Plaintiff/Cross-Defendant/Respondent Max McKelvy sworn and testified on his own behalf.
Defendant/Cross-Complainant/Appellant Diana Meistrell sworn and testified on her own behalf.

The following documentary evidence is introduced and admitted:
Plaintiff/Cross-Defendant/Respondent's Group Exhibit.
Defendant/Cross-Complainant/Appellant's Group Exhibit.
Appellant's and Respondent's exhibits are retained.

The matter is taken under submission.
Judge: Garrett Wong; Clerk: J. Bertelsen; Not reported. (504)
